title: Hear me ... !
content:
Unless the govenrnment can sanction a website to comply with "the government standard" and encourage people (including those in foreign countries) to post their videos on this website, find a way to give us back [YouTube](http://www.youtube.com/) -- for now. [ This must be one of the longest "unless" I've written. ]

People and companies are posting "good videos" (and screencasts, etc.), many enlightening, mind-blowing videos.

Once again, there're many ways to _hack through_ this block but I'd rather ask nicely. :)

TIA!

P.S. No, I didn't forget about this matter. How could I forget when everytime I unknowingly clicked on a YouTube link, I see an ugly green page. ICT, at least design a more beautiful **YOU ARE BLOCKED** page!! (More importantly, "blocked" and "green" don't go together that well, don't you think?)
